title: The Guild Halls
description: Rise through the ranks of the great guilds. Whether you choose the shadow-cloaked Thieves Guild, the arcane Mages Circle, the ironclad Fighters Arena, or the cunning Merchants Consortium, each path offers unique challenges, allies, and rewards.

acts.name: Thieves Guild: The Initiation
acts.description: To join the Thieves Guild, you must complete three tasks: steal a gem from a guarded vault, pick the pocket of a noble, and escape the city watch without being caught.

encounters.name: Vault Guards
encounters.description: Guards patrol the merchant vault where the initiation gem is kept.
encounters.exploration_note: The vault has a side entrance through the sewers. Avoid the main door.

encounters.name: City Watch Pursuit
encounters.description: The city watch pursues you through the alleyways after the theft is discovered.
encounters.exploration_note: Use the rooftops to evade the watch. The chimney on Baker Street leads to a safe house.

objectives.description: Find the hidden Thieves Guild entrance
Speak with the Thieves Guild master
Steal the initiation gem from the vault

acts.name: Thieves Guild: The Grand Heist
acts.description: The guild's biggest job: steal the Star of Aldenmoor from the duke's treasury. Navigate traps, defeat guards, and escape with the prize before the alarm sounds.

encounters.name: Treasury Vault Constructs
encounters.description: Clay golem sentries guard the duke's treasury, immune to bribery.
encounters.exploration_note: The golems respond to a control word. Find the duke's journal for the command.

encounters.name: The Duke's Champion
encounters.description: The duke's personal champion guards the innermost vault with deadly skill.
encounters.exploration_note: The champion has a weakness: flattery. Distract him while an ally grabs the Star.

objectives.description: Bypass or defeat the treasury constructs
Deliver the Star to the guild fence

acts.name: Thieves Guild: The Betrayal
acts.description: A traitor within the guild has sold information to the authorities. Hunt down the informant, who has allied with dangerous mercenaries, and settle the score before the guild is destroyed.

encounters.name: Mercenary Bodyguards
encounters.description: The traitor has hired orc mercenaries for protection.
encounters.exploration_note: The orcs are paid muscle. Offering them double may convince some to switch sides.

encounters.name: The Traitor's Last Stand
encounters.description: The traitor makes a final stand in an abandoned warehouse, backed by a summoned succubus.
encounters.exploration_note: The succubus feeds on the traitor's fear. Eliminating the traitor first weakens it.

objectives.description: Track the traitor to their hideout

acts.name: Mage Tower: The Entrance Exam
acts.description: To join the Mages Circle, pass the entrance exam: navigate an enchanted maze filled with elemental challenges, solve arcane puzzles, and demonstrate mastery over at least one school of magic.

encounters.name: Fire Elemental Test
encounters.description: A fire elemental manifests as the first trial of elemental mastery.
encounters.exploration_note: Water spells deal double damage. The fountains in the maze provide water ammunition.

encounters.name: Earth Elemental Test
encounters.description: An earth elemental blocks the maze's second junction.
encounters.exploration_note: The floor tiles spell out the weakness. Step on them in the right order.

encounters.name: Arcane Golem Final Exam
encounters.description: A stone golem serves as the final examiner, testing all spell schools.
encounters.exploration_note: The golem adapts to repeated spell types. Vary your attacks.

objectives.description: Receive your acceptance from the Archmage

acts.name: Mage Tower: The Research Assignment
acts.description: Your first assignment as a Circle member: retrieve rare reagents from a dangerous location for the Archmage's research. The caves are infested with oozes and the reagents are guarded.

encounters.name: Ooze-Infested Caves
encounters.description: Black puddings and ochre jellies have overrun the reagent caves.
encounters.exploration_note: Oozes dissolve metal. Use wooden or magical weapons.

encounters.name: Water Elemental Spring
encounters.description: A water elemental guards the purest reagent spring.
encounters.exploration_note: Lightning spells are devastating against water elementals.

objectives.description: Defeat the water elemental spring guardians
Collect rare reagents from the caves
Deliver the reagents to the lead researcher

acts.name: Mage Tower: Arcane Defense
acts.description: The Mage Tower is under attack by a demon cult seeking to steal forbidden tomes. Defend the tower, repel the attackers, and prevent the shadow demon from breaching the wards.

encounters.name: Cultist Assault Wave
encounters.description: Cultist fanatics storm the tower's lower floors.
encounters.exploration_note: The tower's ward stones can be activated to create barriers on each floor.

encounters.name: Shadow Demon Breach
encounters.description: A shadow demon phases through the wards, attacking from the ethereal plane.
encounters.exploration_note: The light crystals on the walls can banish the shadow demon back to the ethereal.

objectives.description: Report the attack to the Archmage

acts.name: Fighters Arena: The First Blood
acts.description: Enter the Fighters Arena and prove your worth in the first tier of combat. Defeat increasingly tough opponents in the gladiatorial pit to earn your arena name.

encounters.name: Orc Gladiators
encounters.description: Three orc warriors fight as a team in the arena pit.
encounters.exploration_note: The orcs fight in formation. Break their line to gain the advantage.

encounters.name: The Ogre Champion
encounters.description: An ogre champion enters the ring for the final bout of the first tier.
encounters.exploration_note: The ogre is slow. Use the arena pillars for cover between attacks.

objectives.description: Receive your arena name from the arena master

acts.name: Fighters Arena: The Grand Tournament
acts.description: The annual Grand Tournament draws the best fighters from across the realm. Battle through four rounds of increasingly deadly opponents to claim the champion's belt.

encounters.name: Troll Berserker
encounters.description: A troll enters the arena, its regeneration making it nearly unstoppable.
encounters.exploration_note: Fire braziers around the arena can be knocked onto the troll to stop regeneration.

encounters.name: The Iron Champion
encounters.description: An iron golem serves as the tournament's final challenger.
encounters.exploration_note: The iron golem is immune to many attacks. Use lightning or acid.

objectives.description: Defeat the troll berserkers in the semi-finals
Defeat the iron golem champion in the finals

acts.name: Fighters Arena: War Contract
acts.description: The Fighters Guild has accepted a war contract to clear a monster-infested fortress for a noble lord. Lead a squad of guild fighters to storm the stronghold and eliminate all threats.

encounters.name: Fortress Garrison
encounters.description: Gnoll packmasters and their bugbear allies hold the outer fortress.
encounters.exploration_note: The fortress gate can be breached with a battering ram found in the siege camp.

encounters.name: The Chimera in the Tower
encounters.description: A chimera nests in the fortress tower, the final obstacle.
encounters.exploration_note: Lure the chimera out of the tower where it cannot use its flight advantage.

objectives.description: Defeat the chimera in the tower
Report mission completion to the noble lord

acts.name: Merchant Guild: The Trade Route
acts.description: The Merchants Consortium needs a new trade route opened through bandit territory. Clear the road, establish waypoints, and ensure the first caravan arrives safely.

encounters.name: Bandit Roadblock
encounters.description: Bandits have set up a fortified roadblock on the trade route.
encounters.exploration_note: The bandits have a hidden cache of stolen goods nearby.

encounters.name: Hobgoblin Toll Station
encounters.description: A hobgoblin captain has set up an illegal toll station at the mountain pass.
encounters.exploration_note: The toll records reveal connections to a larger criminal network.

acts.name: Merchant Guild: The Price War
acts.description: A rival merchant has been undercutting guild prices using counterfeit goods produced by a yuan-ti counterfeiting ring. Infiltrate the operation and shut it down.

encounters.name: Warehouse Guards
encounters.description: Hired thugs guard the counterfeit warehouse on the docks.
encounters.exploration_note: The warehouse manifest reveals the scale of the counterfeiting operation.

encounters.name: Yuan-ti Counterfeiters
encounters.description: Yuan-ti abominations run the counterfeiting operation from a hidden basement.
encounters.exploration_note: The yuan-ti's acid is used to dissolve real coins and recast them as fakes.

objectives.description: Present evidence to the city magistrate

acts.name: Thieves Guild: The Sewer Heist
acts.description: The guild has discovered a forgotten vault beneath the city sewers. Navigate the flooded tunnels, defeat the creatures lurking below, and crack the vault before a rival gang gets there first.

encounters.name: Sewer Lurkers
encounters.description: Giant spiders and oozes infest the sewer tunnels leading to the vault.
encounters.exploration_note: The higher tunnels are drier and have fewer oozes. Stick to the upper passages.

encounters.name: Rival Gang Ambush
encounters.description: A rival gang has beaten you to the vault approach and set up an ambush.
encounters.exploration_note: The rival gang has a lookout. Taking them out quietly prevents the ambush.

objectives.description: Clear the sewer creatures from the tunnel
Report the haul to the guildmaster

acts.name: Mage Tower: The Forbidden Experiment
acts.description: A rogue mage has been conducting forbidden experiments in a hidden laboratory, creating aberrant creatures. The Circle tasks you with shutting down the lab and neutralizing the creations.

encounters.name: Aberrant Constructs
encounters.description: Clay golems twisted by forbidden magic guard the laboratory entrance.
encounters.exploration_note: The twisted golems have unstable cores. A strong enough hit may cause them to explode.

encounters.name: The Rogue Mage's Creation
encounters.description: The rogue mage's ultimate creation, a beholder-like construct, awakens.
encounters.exploration_note: The construct is powered by three crystals. Destroying them before combat is ideal.

objectives.description: Collect the rogue mage's research notes
Deliver the notes to the Circle council

acts.name: Fighters Arena: The Monster Pit
acts.description: The arena's most dangerous event: the Monster Pit. Survive waves of increasingly deadly creatures released from the arena's dungeons. Only the strongest survive all five waves.

encounters.name: Wave One: Dire Wolves
encounters.description: A pack of dire wolves is released into the pit.
encounters.exploration_note: The wolves attack the weakest target. Protect your flanks.

encounters.name: Wave Three: Trolls
encounters.description: Two trolls charge from the gates, eager for blood.
encounters.exploration_note: The arena torches can be used to ignite the trolls and stop regeneration.

encounters.name: Final Wave: The Pit Champion
encounters.description: A frost giant, the reigning pit champion, enters for the final wave.
encounters.exploration_note: The frost giant throws ice boulders. Keep moving between the arena pillars.

objectives.description: Defeat the frost giant pit champion
Accept the crowd's adulation and the champion's prize

acts.name: Merchant Guild: Hostile Takeover
acts.description: A rival consortium backed by drow mercenaries is attempting a hostile takeover of the guild's most valuable mine. Defend the mine, defeat the mercenaries, and secure the guild's holdings.

encounters.name: Drow Mercenary Assault
encounters.description: Drow elite mercenaries attack the mine entrance at nightfall.
encounters.exploration_note: The drow attack at night for their darkvision advantage. Light spells even the field.

encounters.name: The Rival Consortium Leader
encounters.description: The rival consortium's enforcer, backed by a mind flayer advisor, leads the final push.
encounters.exploration_note: The mind flayer controls the drow mercenaries. Defeating it may scatter them.

objectives.description: Reach and defend the guild mine
Secure the mine's mithral ore reserves
Report the victory to the Consortium leader
